# PERF-95 negative: single shared middleware in a Fiber app
lang: go
file: PERF-095-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"
)

func Build(app *fiber.App) {
	app.Use(commonMW)
	app.Get("/foo", fooHandler)
}

func commonMW(c *fiber.Ctx) error { return c.Next() }
func fooHandler(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	return c.SendString("foo")
}
